seoTitle: Lewiston vs Light Pass — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lewiston and Light Pass. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Lewiston vs Light Pass: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lewiston and Light Pass.
heading: Lewiston vs Light Pass — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lewiston, South Australia and Light Pass, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Light Pass has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Lewiston (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lewiston or Light Pass safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lewiston has a flood risk score of 33/100, while Light Pass scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lewiston scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Light Pass scores 37/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lewiston or Light Pass?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Light Pass has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.07% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
